75197.subject: 🥷🏻 EU Steals Claude from USA
75197.body:
----------
######                  [Collaborate with us](https://utm.genai.works/r/he2t9cz)


--------------------
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/8776fa6e-e2d0-4aec-9648-1bed6de3a659/GenAI_Daily_Banner.jpg?t=1778687445)
Caption: 


----------

----------
**Welcome back!** Europe has no answer to America's top AI labs, so Austria asked the EU to import one and floated relocating Anthropic. Elon Musk says Grok 4.5 is catching Claude on his birthday, then walked the brag back nine hours later. Google is so short on compute it's rationing Gemini to its own rival Meta, and one in three employers admit they're handing entry-level jobs to AI.



**In today's Generative AI Newsletter:**

* **Anthropic:** Why is Austria trying to move an American AI lab to Europe?

* **Grok:** What did Musk announce on his birthday?

* **AI Drama:** Who's so short on compute they're rationing Gemini to Meta?

* **Jobs:** What happens to the career ladder when AI takes the first rung?


----------



----------
## [EU is stealing Claude from USA](https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2026-06-28/austria-lobbies-eu-to-host-anthropic-after-us-access-curbs)

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/f7670e47-44fe-49d8-b3db-5c280a9fe17f/Beehiiv_01_-_Jun_29.png?t=1782725080)
Caption: 

Europe has no frontier AI lab of its own, so this week it tried to poach one. Austria's digital secretary Alexander Pröll wrote to the EU urging it to bring Anthropic inside the bloc, offering "legal certainty, market access, capital and a set of values that suits this company."

The pitch comes barely two weeks after Washington cut every foreigner on earth off from Fable 5 and Mythos 5, Anthropic's two strongest models, citing national security. 

It won't work, and Pröll half-knows it, conceding there would be skepticism about whether it's even possible. Anthropic is mid-build on $50 billion of Amazon-backed data centers in Texas and New York, and you can't import your way out of an export order.

A year ago AI was a product you bought. Now it's national infrastructure, and Europe just learned the on-off switch sits in Washington. 


----------







----------
## [100 agents. One codebase. No human in the loop](https://link.genai.works/XxPu)

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/97cbdf52-2e43-4809-8abf-65fc55a48350/image.png?t=1782724970)
Follow image link: (https://link.genai.works/XxPu)
Caption: 

What happens when 100 AI agents share one codebase?

They discover each other at runtime, split the work, review each other's output, and ship - coordinated by a harness, not a human approving every step. AgentField is the open-source control plane that makes it run, o

75195.subject: ✨ June Journey: Production, Premieres & Performance
75195.body:
THE NEWSLETTER 

Автор: Volkswagen Group


Автор: Volkswagen Group

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/june-journey-production-premieres-performance-volkswagen-group-jthre?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BHx%2Bp2fshSMuuGOTii7sBTQ%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=0TlpST4wL8nIk1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mqyzyr8j~kd-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mqyzyr8j-kd
  
Welcome to our June newsletter! This month highlights strong progress across the Volkswagen Group – from key production milestones and world premieres to advancements in electrification, energy integration and performance innovation. From the start of production for the CUPRA Raval and Volkswagen ID. Polo in Martorell to the Škoda Epiq in Pamplona, June showcases how we are expanding our electric portfolio and driving accessible mobility forward. At the same time, innovations such as Vehicle-to-Grid technology and high-performance developments like the Audi Nuvolari underline our technological ambition, while milestones like 50 years of GTI and the Best Apprentice Award highlight our heritage and future talent. Together, these stories reflect the transformation, collaboration and innovation shaping the future of mobility across the Group. 🔍 Explore the 9️⃣ highlights that shaped this month: 🚗 1. SOP: CUPRA Raval & Volkswagen ID. Polo SEAT S.A. & CUPRA plant in Martorell starts production of CUPRA Raval and Volkswagen ID. Polo, leading a new era of mobility in Europe. The Electric Urban Car Family enters production with four models from three brands, all Made in Spain, set to make electric mobility accessible across Europe. The start of production marks the beginning of a new era and positions Martorell as an automotive powerhouse. 🗨️ Oliver Blume, CEO of Volkswagen Group: "With the Electric Urban Car Family, Volkswagen Group is stepping up electrification in Europe. We are investing several billions to make Spain a central hub of electromobility. Even as global competition intensifies, we believe in Europe – our Electric Urban Car Family will be from Europe, for Europe. It is now crucial to build on this momentum with a clear Made-in-Europe strategy."  ⚡ 2. SOP: Škoda Epiq Starts Production in Pamplona Series production of the Škoda Epiq, the brand’s most accessible electric model, has begun at the Volkswagen Navarra plant in Pamplona, Spain. This marks an important step in strengthening synergies within Volkswagen’s Brand Group Core (BGC), with the Epiq complementing its Electric Urban Car Family. All four models from CUPRA, Volkswagen and Škoda will be produced in Spain. 🗨️ Klaus Zellmer , CEO of Škoda Auto: “Launching production of the new Škoda Epiq is a historic moment. With the momentum of Brand Group Core, we’re mak

75191.subject: Cenová po(sh)nuka
75191.body:
Zdravím Ruslana a Oleh ! 💍🤍

Podarilo sa nám sfinalizovať cenovú ponuku na výzdobu.

Cenová ponuka je samozrejme kostra - ak budete chcieť niečo ubrať alebo
pridať, samozrejme zmeny doladíme, pretože ste neposlali žiadne obrázky k
výzdobe, tak sme išli len podľa toho čo sme sa rozprávali..
Radi si prejdeme všetko. Sme otvorení konštruktívnej kritike aj úprimnému
názoru, takže sa nebojíme slov "toto nechcem" alebo "toto sa nám nepáči",
pretože dizajn je veľmi subjektívny pocit. 😊🙏 Nenaceňovali sme obrad,
pretože nevieme ešte čo budeme a kde robiť. :)

Podávam kontakt aj na grafičku.
V prípade záujmu o svadobné oznámania či pozvánky a iné tlačoviny ako
etikety, nálepky a podobne, naša grafička z Dekami.creativ Vám je k
dispozícií, stačí ju kontaktovať, ona už o Vás bude vedieť. Ona bude
samostatne naceňovať tlačoviny (menu, zasadací poriadok...). 😊 Katarína
Nagyová -nagyovakatarina11@gmail.com
www.dekami.sk

Budeme sa tešiť na Vašu spätnú väzbu! 🩷

S pozdravom

Lenka

-- 
S pozdravom

Ing. Lenka Gattiker, MBA
Vaša osobná posh asistentka

Svadobná Agentúra PoshPosh

www.poshposh.sk

75190.subject: Európe hrozí nová vlna likvidácie priemyslu
75190.body:
VÝBER TRENDU

Автор: TREND.sk


Автор: TREND.sk

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/eur%C3%B3pe-hroz%C3%AD-nov%C3%A1-vlna-likvid%C3%A1cie-priemyslu-trend-holding-5ekle?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3Bw71vrw2%2BSEqRCskQqy7H7w%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=2G2c5zeld7nIk1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mqyveoac~3d-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mqyveoac-3d
  
Minulý týždeň dostal európsky automotive tri rany naraz. BMW oznámilo, že jeho marža môže tento rok klesnúť až na jedno percento oproti pôvodnému výhľadu šesť percent. Mercedes-Benz otvára rokovania s odbormi o ďalších úsporách, hoci má s pracovníkmi dohody platné do roku 2034, vylučujúce prepúšťanie. A Stellantis potvrdil, že jeho závod v bretónskom Rennes – fabrika, ktorá od 60. rokov vyrábala Citroëny – začne od roku 2028 vyrábať autá pre čínsku značku Voyah, dcéru Dongfeng Motor...pokračovanie Slovákov snívajúcich o byte pri Jadrane prebúdza chladná realita Sen o pasívnom príjme pri Jadrane naráža na čísla, ktoré väčšina investorov pred kúpou nevidela. Kde na chorvátskom pobreží investícia ešte dáva zmysel a kde už ceny predbehli výnosy? Čínske autá doma nechcú, do Európy sa valí ďalšia vlna exportu Domáci trh je slabý, nadprodukcia vyráža do sveta Volvo opäť prekvapilo Slovensko. Košice môžu vyrábať aj iné čínske autá Nenápadné priznanie šéfa Volva môže prepísať budúcnosť najväčšej investície na východe Slovenska. Prečo je to dobrá vec Stávka proti Stellantisu: hedžové fondy neveria európskemu autopriemyslu Hedžové fondy vytvárajú rekordné stávky proti dlhu aj akciám Stellantisu, Volkswagenu, BMW a Mercedes-Benz. Čínski výrobcovia obsadili 8,5 percenta trhu EÚ Kam smerujú miliardy z Packety a prečo menia pravidlá hry Po najväčšom českom exite posledných rokov nešli peniaze do AI startupov. Bývalá majiteľka Packety Simona Kijonková stavia na úplne iné odvetvia Faktúra za AI rastie. Google prišiel s odpoveďou, ktorú nečakal Firmy premrhajú ročné AI rozpočty ešte pred letom. Kým OpenAI zdvojnásobuje ceny a Anthropic láka výkonnosťou, Google vsádza na niečo, čo rivali nevedia napodobniť Neurovedkyňa radí, ako využiť prokrastináciu a čím nahradiť ciele, ktoré človeka blokujú Toxická kultúra cieľov a výkonnosti naučila človeka vnímať každú aktivitu ako prostriedok k nejakému výsledku, úplne sa pri tom zabudlo na hru
Продовжити читати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/eur%C3%B3pe-hroz%C3%AD-nov%C3%A1-vlna-likvid%C3%A1cie-priemyslu-trend-holding-5ekle?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3Bw71vrw2%2BSEqRCskQqy7H7w%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=2G2c5zeld7nIk1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-newsletter_content_preview_text-0-readmore_button_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow
